title: Letter F and friends
description: Letter F — your anchor key. Feel the little bump?
text: f f f f fa fa fa af af af fad fad fad ass ass ass sad sad sad
finger_focus: Left index finger finds F — anchor!
tips: F is your LEFT anchor — feel the bump under your finger

character_tips.anna: F has a little bump. That's your anchor — always find it by feel 🌷
character_tips.maxim: F-anchor. The most important key. Always find it without looking.
character_tips.knopych: F = ANCHOR! 🎯 Feel the bump? That's your home!
character_tips.klavochka: F is your home, my dear! Like a cozy pillow under your finger 🛌
